subject: DevOps
title: Compliance Frameworks Overview
description: Learn Compliance Frameworks Overview in one minute.

hook.text: GDPR, SOC 2, HIPAA, PCI DSS — acronyms that keep CISOs up at night. Compliance isn't optional.

buildup.text: Frameworks define security controls you must implement. They vary by industry, region, and data type.

discovery.text: SOC 2 covers service orgs. HIPAA guards health data. PCI DSS secures payments. GDPR covers EU data.

twist.text: Compliance isn't security. You can pass and still be vulnerable. But non-compliance means fines.

climax.text: Automate compliance checks. Map controls to requirements. Continuous compliance beats annual audits.

punchline.text: Know your requirements. Automate them. Stay audit-ready.

quiz.question: Why doesn't compliance automatically mean you're secure?
options: You can meet all compliance requirements and still have unaddressed vulnerabilities
Security tools don't work with compliance frameworks
